# close()

**Instance Method**

Closes the stream and releases associated resources.

## Declaration

```swift
func close() throws
```

## Discussion

After calling [doc://com.apple.applearchive/documentation/AppleArchive/ArchiveByteStreamProtocol/close()], expect that subsequent function calls on the stream to trigger a runtime error.

You must close all opened streams, otherwise deinitialization causes a runtime error.

## Using Archive Byte Streams

- **seek(toOffset:relativeTo:)**: Updates the internal stream position to the specified offset relative to the specified origin.
- **cancel()**: Cancels stream operations.
